title: lazy-sunday spanish cheese-pull paella
description: sweet breakfast or brunch recipe featuring castelvetrano olives and a gooey cheese pull in a clay pot
instructions: heat oil in a large clay pot over medium heat
add cooked onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes
add uncooked rice and stir to coat in oil
add turmeric, paprika, and salt, stir to combine
add chicken broth, 1 cup at a time, until rice is cooked and liquid is absorbed
stir in diced tomatoes and shredded cheese until melted and creamy
stir in chopped olives and cook for 1-2 minutes
transfer paella to a warm serving plate and let rest for 5 minutes before serving
